messages.content:
A good punchline is a clever or funny ending to a joke or story. It's the part of the joke that leaves a lasting impression on the listener. Some examples of good punchlines include:

*   "Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!"
*   "Why did the chicken refuse to eat the hard-boiled egg? Because it didn't want to Eggle-stain its shirt!"
*   "Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was out-standing in his field!"
*   "Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired."

I hope these examples give you some inspiration for your own jokes!
